# proxmox_backup_server_s3_config (Resource)

Manages a Proxmox Backup Server S3 client configuration via `/config/s3`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "proxmox_backup_server_s3_config" "example" {
  id         = "backup-s3"
  endpoint   = "s3.example.com"
  access_key = "example-access-key"
  secret_key = var.s3_secret_key

  region     = "us-east-1"
  path_style = true

  provider_quirks = [
    "skip-if-none-match-header",
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `access_key` (String) Access key for the S3 object store.
- `endpoint` (String) Host name or IP address of the S3 object store. Do not include a protocol scheme or port; use `port` for non-default ports.
- `id` (String) ID to uniquely identify the S3 client config.
- `secret_key` (String, Sensitive) Secret key for the S3 object store. Proxmox Backup Server does not return this value from read APIs, so Terraform preserves the configured value in state.

### Optional

- `burst_in` (String) Incoming burst limit as a byte size with optional unit.
- `burst_out` (String) Outgoing burst limit as a byte size with optional unit.
- `fingerprint` (String) X509 certificate fingerprint (SHA256).
- `path_style` (Boolean) Use path style bucket addressing over vhost style.
- `port` (Number) Port to access the S3 object store.
- `provider_quirks` (List of String) Provider-specific feature implementation quirks. Supported values include `skip-if-none-match-header` and `delete-objects-via-delete-object`.
- `put_rate_limit` (Number) Rate limit for PUT requests, in requests per second. Proxmox Backup Server does not allow this value to be deleted after it is set, so Terraform preserves the prior state value when omitted from configuration.
- `rate_in` (String) Incoming rate limit as a byte size with optional unit.
- `rate_out` (String) Outgoing rate limit as a byte size with optional unit.
- `region` (String) Region to access the S3 object store.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import proxmox_backup_server_s3_config.example backup-s3
```
